title: BEM-840 Claude secret wiring
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 16:01 (UTC+3)'
# Add a non-secret checker script for GitHub Actions. It only records whether env names are present, never values.
checker=Path('scripts/check_claude_secret_wiring.py')
checker.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json, os\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nkyiv=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nnow=datetime.now(kyiv).strftime('%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)')\nPath('governance/state').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nstate={\n  'schema_version':'claude_secret_wiring_check.v1',\n  'checked_at':now,\n  'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_present':bool(os.environ.get('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY')),\n  'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_present':bool(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN')),\n  'note':'Only boolean presence is recorded. Secret values are never printed.'\n}\nif state['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_present'] or state['CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_present']:\n  state['status']='secret_present'\nelse:\n  state['status']='secret_missing'\nPath('governance/state/claude_secret_wiring_check.json').write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\\n', encoding='utf-8')\nprint(json.dumps({'status':state['status'],'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_present':state['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_present'],'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_present':state['CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_present']}, ensure_ascii=False))\n''')
# Patch dispatcher workflow to run the checker before Claude action if the workflow exists.
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
patched=False
if wf.exists():
    txt=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'scripts/check_claude_secret_wiring.py' not in txt:
        insert='''\n      - name: Check Claude secret wiring\n        env:\n          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}\n          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}\n        run: python3 scripts/check_claude_secret_wiring.py\n'''
        marker='      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox'
        if marker in txt:
            txt=txt.replace(marker, insert+marker, 1)
        else:
            txt=txt+insert
        wf.write_text(txt)
        patched=True
# Commit script should include the wiring state if produced by workflow.
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'claude_secret_wiring_checker_installed','workflow_exists':wf.exists(),'workflow_patched':patched,'checker':str(checker),'operator_note':'If Claude platform shows keys Last used 30+ days, GitHub secret is likely missing/wrong or workflow never reaches Claude action. Do not paste secret into chat. Add repo Action secret ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN as used by workflow.','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_claude_secret_wiring_proof.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_claude_secret_wiring_proof.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Claude Secret Wiring Proof | CHECKER_INSTALLED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Claude dispatcher/tick and verify governance/state/claude_secret_wiring_check.json plus Claude runtime/response. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Claude secret wiring checker installed. Next: trigger dispatcher and verify secret presence proof, runtime, and real response.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['scripts/check_claude_secret_wiring.py','governance/state/bem840_claude_secret_wiring_proof.json','governance/reports/bem840_claude_secret_wiring_proof.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if wf.exists(): changed.append(str(wf))
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Installed non-secret Claude wiring checker and patched Claude dispatcher workflow to record secret presence booleans without exposing values')
"""
